problem id: ac5f6747
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(2) XOR SHR(7)

examples:
  11010111 -> 01011101
  11011101 -> 01110101
  11100110 -> 10011001
  01010000 -> 01000000
  10010111 -> 01011101
  00000101 -> 00010100
  10100100 -> 10010001
  01011100 -> 01110000
  01010101 -> 01010100

query: 10000110
predicted answer: 00011001
